nasb.text: He brought me forth also into a broad place; He rescued me, because He delighted in me.

esv.text: He brought me out into a broad place; he rescued me, because he delighted in me.

cnv.text: 他又領我出去，到那寬闊之地； 他搭救我，因為他喜悅我。

ccb.text: 祂拯救我，领我到宽阔之地， 因为祂喜悦我。

csbs.text: 他把我领出来，到宽阔之地； 他搭救了我，因为他喜悦我。
